errors: Zero entry signals generated on test data

history.hypothesis: The previous attempt failed because entry conditions were too restrictive, generating zero signals. For volatile semiconductor stocks like NVDA, AMD, SMCI, price regularly dips below the lower Bollinger Band. Using an OR condition between RSI oversold and Stochastic oversold (rather than requiring both) ensures signals are generated while still filtering for genuine mean reversion setups. Lenient thresholds (RSI < 40, Stoch K < 30) combined with BB lower band penetration should produce 15+ trades over 2 years on these high-volatility names.
